headline: AI for Audio Processing: Sound Event Detection, Acoustic Scene Analysis, and Environmental Intelligence
description: AI is giving machines the ability to hear and understand their acoustic environment — detecting sirens, recognizing bird species, localizing breaking glass, and monitoring urban noise pollution. From smart cities to wildlife conservation, AI audio processing transforms sound from background noise into actionable intelligence.

citation.name: Environmental acoustic intelligence through sound event localization and detection
Environmental sound recognition on embedded devices using deep learning: A review
